feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Re: IAS with Work Zone, Standard Edition
entry.content:
Hi All,

I don’t see the Identity authentication tab on SAP build workzone settings section. Although i have configured my trial account with Custom IAS teant and also i have the Launchpad admin role.

 

Please check and help me with the issue.

entry.title: Unable to find Identity Authentication tab in SAP Build Work Zone standard edition.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I don’t see the Identity authentication tab on SAP build workzone settings section. Although i have configured my trial account with Custom IAS tenant and also i have the Launchpad admin role assigned to my IAS User.

are there any changes recently or am i missing something? Please help .

 

@SAPSupport @William_Yu 

 

Regards,

Rakesh

entry.title: Problem registering my desktop agent in my BTP Build Process Automation Trial Account
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm facing an issue while registering my Desktop agent in my BTP Trial Build Process Automation App.

I followed the SAP Developers Guide to set up the agent locally on my PC, and I enabled the Chrome and Edge extensions to try and connect the agent with my trial app. However, I encounter a problem when clicking on the agent in the control tower to get the information needed to register it with my local desktop agent.

It loads for hours without any response. I thought it might be due to my internet connection, but nothing changed after switching to another Wi-Fi network.

Can you please help me set this up?

Thanks,
Ilyass

entry.title: SAP Build WorkZone MyInbox App - Local copy
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I would like to create a tile in Work Zone standard of My Inbox app with showAdditionalAttributes = true.

This requires me to create a local copy of My Inbox Html5 app.

Unfortunately, after that the Count at the tile stops working.

In the browser console I can see that there is Internal server error 500.

Do you have any ideas what could be the problem?

Thank you,

Patrik

entry.title: Get logged in user data in SAP Build Work Zone Advance edition
entry.content: I have deployed an application and made a tile in sap build workzone advance edition. In the deployed application I want to send the userId/Usercode/email any of the mentioned which is assigned to me in the payload. Help me to get the login data from sap build workzone advance edition.

entry.title: Is it possible in WZ to access or modify JAM content like workspace or workpage using shellplugin?
entry.content:
Using the shell plugin in SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition can I access to JAM contents to retrive o or working with the contents like context variables, work pages or workspace?

 

Regards

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA Error while passing payload using postman - p...
entry.content:
Hi, @Dan_Wroblewski 

In response to the above statement, I have ensured that the data type is set to Integer. I will attach the screenshot below. Additionally, I have passed this payload  from Postman

 {
        "job input": [
                {
                    "JobCount": 8190900,
                    "JobName": "ERP Job 18-20240320-170100-1"
                },
                {
                    "JobCount": 8191000,
                    "JobName": "ERP Job 18-20240320-170100-2"
                },
                {
                    "JobCount": 8191200,
                    "JobName": "ERP Job 18-20240320-170100-3"
                },
                {
                    "JobCount": 8191300,
                    "JobName": "ERP Job 18-20240320-170100-4"
                }
]}

entry.title: IPS Sync Issue : S/4HANA Cloud Private edition User and Roles Sync
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

We're trying to sync the users and their roles from SAP S/4Hana Cloud, Private Edition to Work Zone (standard) using IPS sync. 

We've followed the below process by referring the help documents. 

  • Configure the Identity Provisioning Service | SAP Help Portal
  • SAP Application Server ABAP | SAP Help Portal
  • Configure Identity Provisioning Service | SAP Help Portal

However, while performing the sync we're getting issue "Initialization of repository destination <destination_name> Failed: No user identity is configured". 

S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition version : 2022 

Steps Followed: 

1. Established the cloud connector setup with BTP Subaccount 

2. Subscribed the SAP Identity service, connectivity plan to BTP subaccount based on IAS region

3. Created a dedicated destination with "RFC" as connection type with cloud connector information and checked the connection 

4. Created Source system with type "SAP Application Server ABAP" and selected the destination (point3).

5. Created target system with type "SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition" 

6. Performed the Read / Resync action from the Source system. 

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Necesito saber los ID de usuario que están utilizando los aplicativos de workzone.
entry.content: Hola necesito conocer los Id de usuarios que están accediendo a los aplicativos de workzone. Las estadísticas de uso solo me indican cuantos usuarios. ¿cómo puedo conocer los ID de usuarios?

entry.title: SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hello, experts
I have a question about Build Apps. I understand that the build app is based on Low code/No code
Can't you draw a screen using codes such as ABAP or JAVASCRIPT at all? I wonder if I can draw a screen by directly inserting the code rather than calling it through OData. For example, I drag and use a button with drag and drop, but I wonder if it is possible to draw a button on the screen by squeezing it into code at the same time
Rather than writing free JavaScript code like in a typical coding environment, it can be used in a limited environment. For example, processing a specific variable or adding a simple calculation logic, is that right?

entry.title: Custom CSS for component based UI Integration Cards
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm using UI integration card for my advanced workzone on BTP.

The UI integration card is component based.

It works but I can't add custom css.

In a freestyle UI5 app I'm adding css file, reference it in the manifest and it works.

I did it for the card project but on runtime I'm getting 404 for the style file.

Is it possible to add custom css for a component based UI integration card?

If yes, how?

Regards,

Omri

entry.title: How to use USHELL API in SAP WORKZONE
entry.content:
Im developing a UI Integration Card in SAP WORKZONE Adv. version.

There seem to be two following issues, and if anyone knows well, please help.

1. Creating an app using a smart table on my card. In that app, I want to use use VariantManagement to provide Variant Storage.. VariantManagement doesn't work.

It works well if you make it into a UI5 freestyle app and deploy it, but it doesn't work on Workzone Card.

2. On the card, when you try to use sap.ushell.container (SHELL API), an error occurs. When you check from the console, there is no sap.ushell.container object on the Workzone Card.

The above two causes are assumed to exist in a different context than Workzone Shell because the workzone card is serviced in the form of iframe, and therefore the varaint personalization and the husell API cannot be used because of the lack of access to the husell service.

Accordingly, is there any other way to use USHELL?

Additionally, I found someone with a similar problem to me, and this person seems to be calling the API with postMessage

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/multi-tenant-cap-application-integration-in-build-work-zone-via-iframe/ba-p/13562133

Is there any other way other than that?
SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition 
@

entry.title: Is there way enable and disable tile and catalog through api in SAP workzone
entry.content:
Hi Team,

There is requirement to enable or disable  tile and catalog on certain user action in capm application.

is there any way we can control the visibility of tile on work zone launchpage ?

for some user i want to display or assign catalog if he qualify the condition.

Regards

Ratnesh

Ratnesh

entry.title: How to access Work Zone Content from the Configuration Editor?
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

first time posting, so please excuse possible mistakes in posting this question. 

I'm facing the following problem. I developed an UI Integration Card in SAP Business Application Studio, which makes use of the Configuration Editor, when imported into SAP Work Zone AE. Despite the shown possibilities, I don't understand how I can make content, residing in a Work Zone workspace, accessable in this Configuration Editor. What I'm aiming for, would be something similar to the Configuration Editor of the Rotating Banner Widget: 

I would appreciate it very much, if someone could nudge me into the right direction on how to face this problem. What I saw by inspecting our Work Zone instance, is the content_ajax calls made by Work Zone to fetch the content data. But how I could make them usable in the Configuration Editor, is out of my current understanding. 

Thank you very much in advance. 

Max

SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition SAPUI5 SAP Business Application Studio

entry.title: Embedding S4 Custom Fiori app inside BTP Fiori app
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,
I would like to embed/load S/4HANA Custom Fiori App inside BTP hosted freestyle Fiori App in a container or iframe. I was investigating if this is doable, flow is that user wants to load the S/4HANA deployed Fiori app from the Custom SAPUI5 app deployed in BTP based on some criteria with some parameter on click of a button on next screen which will be detail screen wrapping up the embedded Fiori app from S/4HANA by passing the required URL parameter, is there any way this can be achieved through standard services on BTP or is it doable?

Any point of view or suggestions are most welcome.

Thanks, Siddharth

SAP Business Technology Platform SAPUI5 SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition

entry.title: Looking for app developers who monitor apps they deployed
entry.content:
Hi,

We're working on a new dashboard for application monitoring for frontend, backend, and fullstack developers. 

I'm looking for developers who monitor the application they deployed for short interview to better understand what info you would expect to see and what actions you would expect to be available for you.

No need to prepare anything. Only meet for 30 min interview and impact on dashboard design.

Your feedback is highly appreciated.

Ravid (ravid.ellenbogen@sap.com)

entry.title: Looking for app developers who monitor apps they deployed
entry.content:
Hi,

We're working on a new dashboard for application monitoring for frontend, backend, and fullstack developers. 

I'm looking for developers who monitor the application they deployed for short interview to better understand what info you would expect to see and what actions you would expect to be available for you.

No need to prepare anything. Only meet for 30 min interview and impact on dashboard design.

Your feedback is highly appreciated.

Ravid (ravid.ellenbogen@sap.com)

entry.title: Duplicate "sap.app/id" Error in SAP Build Work Zone HTML5 Apps for Multiple Spaces Same Subaccount
entry.content:
I am currently deploying multiple HTML5 applications under SAP Build Work Zone, Advanced Edition. The setup involves segregating all services between two different spaces: dev and qa, but both spaces are within the same subaccount. However, I am encountering the following error after deployment when i fetch HTML 5 apps in :

Duplicate "sap.app/id", id must be unique in subaccount.
Failed to search [service name]

I am receiving similar errors for multiple services, and this issue is blocking the deployment. Here’s a summary of the errors for different services:

  • dummyfile1: Duplicate "sap.app/id", Failed to search service.
  • dummyfile2: Duplicate "sap.app/id", Failed to search service.
  • dummyfile3 : Duplicate "sap.app/id", Failed to search service.

    It appears that there is a constraint violation regarding the uniqueness of the sap.app/id. Despite following the standard approach to segregate services across dev and qa spaces, the subaccount does not seem to handle this duplication well.

    Key Issues:

    • Duplicate "sap.app/id": The ID needs to be unique within the subaccount, but I need to deploy the same services in both dev and qa spaces.

      Could anyone provide guidance on how to resolve this issue?

      Is there a recommended approach for handling deployments of the same services in different spaces under the same subaccount while maintaining unique IDs?

      What adjustments should be made to the manifest files to avoid these errors?
       

      Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Adding Background Image to All Tiles in Workzone Advance Page
entry.content:
I have a requirement to add a background image to all tiles on the Workzone Advance page using Theming.

I attempted to add the image through **/comsapuitheming.themedesigner/**, and while it works, I encountered an issue. The ID for the tile is not fixed. If my application has two pages, the background image is applied to the first tile of whichever page loads first.

Additionally, all static tiles created in Workzone do not have specific IDs associated with the names given to them, which complicates applying the image to individual tiles using css.

Could you please assist with this issue?

entry.title: SAP Workzone: handling Knowledge Base and Documents expiring
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Is it possible for Workzone to send reminders/open tasks to the system admins and the publication owner for the review of expiring documents and knowledge bases?

We know that is possibile to set pubblication Settings (Publication Settings for Blog Posts, Wiki Pages, or Knowledge Base Articles ) but we didn't find anything about "warning" of expriration of KBA or similars.

Thanks!

Kind regarrds,

Leila
